summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of LeadixAI marketing site. All 3 pages (Home, Pricing, Results) fully functional with interactive elements, animations, and responsive design working correctly.
passed_tests: Home page loads with all 8+ sections (Hero, Logo Strip, Problem/Solution, Features, How It Works, Demo, Testimonials, CTA, Footer)
Navbar fixed/sticky with frosted glass effect on scroll, all navigation links working
Hero section with gradient text, dashboard mockup with shimmer animations, floating elements (notification toast, conversion pill, mini chart)
Logo strip with marquee animation working
Features section with 3 main cards + 3 mini feature cards, 'Most Popular' badge on middle card
How It Works dark section with 3 steps and proper styling
Demo section fully interactive - Generate button triggers animation with typewriter effect, Unlock button shows email form
Navigation between all 3 pages working (Home -> Pricing -> Results -> Home)
Pricing page: Monthly/Annual toggle works, 3 pricing cards (Starter $0, Pro $10, Growth $25), Pro card has 'Most Popular' badge
Pricing page: Compare Plans table with 18 rows, FAQ accordion with 10 items that open/close
Pricing page: Competitor comparison table present and functional
Results page: Hero with metrics strip (10,000+, 5,000+, 2.5x, 500+)
Results page: 3 testimonial cards + featured testimonial + 3 case study cards
Results page: Before/After panels with VS badge + 4-item timeline
Custom cursor visible on desktop, hidden on mobile
Mobile responsiveness - mobile menu works correctly
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
